title: rinorea friisii
intro: Rinorea friisii, also known as the Frere's broom, is a climbing plant species in the family Violaceae. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of bioactive compounds such as alkaloids and flavonoids, which have been shown to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Rinorea friisii include its potential use in treating various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Rinorea friisii are typically made by infusing its leaves in hot water or mixing its extracts with other herbs to create a medicinal tea.
